title: Jordan's Modpack
description: This modpack adds a variety of mods including but not limited to: Essentials, Flashback, Cactus, Controlify, Worldedit, Appleskin.
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b934f54c52444da8c16aa548886325ad2a2fc786.png)

## Why Would You Want To Download This Modpack
- It adds many Complex & Simple mods that enhance gameplay and make your minecraft experence better.

## What Does My Modpack Add
- QOL Mods like **Appleskin** and **Cactus**
- Privacy Mods like **Exploit Preventer**
- Performance mods like **Sodium**
- Creative Mods like **WorldEdit** and **Litematica**
- Visual Mods like **Wavey Capes** and **Iris Shaders**
- Advanced Multiplayer Support like **Simple Voice Chat**

## What My Modpack Does **not** Include
- Profanity
- Hacked / Cheat Clients
- Stolen Content
- Illigal Content
